chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C.P No.D-646 of 2013 Date Order with signature of the Judge Priority 1 For hearing of Misc. No. 5239 of 2015 2. For hearing of Misc. No. 2613 of 2013 3. For hearing of Main Case. 14-12-2016 Chaudhry Azhar Illahi, advocate for the Petitioner Shaikh Liaquat Hussain, Standing Counsel Khawaja Saiful Islam advocate holding brief for Khawaja Shamsul Islam, advocate for the respondents ********************* At-least for three dates i.e. 18.03.2015, 15.08.2016 and 02.11.2016 nobody appeared for the petitioners. Learned counsel for the petitioners submit that, the petitioner No.1 has expired while the petitioner No.2 is not in contact despite various approaches therefore he pleads no instructions. Since the learned counsel for the petitioner pleads no instructions, this petition is dismissed along with listed applications. J u d g e J u d g e BrohiPS
